text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Suzukaaaaa!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Suzuka! Ohhh, you were really zoom'n out there!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I agree. You truly gave us a remarkable race. Even my legs are itching to race after seeing that.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What a performance...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: But I won't let you leave me in the dust.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I am also filled to bursting with inspiration! Please, please, please run
with me, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Goodness me... That was indeed very exciting.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Tachyon?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Your performance today has taken Umamusume to new heights. A
historic moment indeed.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You and your trainer truly make for the most magnificent research
material.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Research material? Um... what?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Better keep those researcher eyes peeled then. There'll be plenty of
views of Silence Suzuka winning from now on.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Heh... I look forward to that.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Well, you can't stick around all day. You've an awards ceremony to
attend.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Well, you can't stick around all day. You've an awards ceremony to
attend.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, you're right.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your support, everyone. I heard each and every one of
your voices on the track today.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Including yours, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's my job to give you the push you need. Besides, you did
exactly what I asked of you...
choice_data_list: You came back to me. Welcome home.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's my job to give you the push you need. Besides, you did
exactly what I asked of you...
choice_data_list: You came back to me. Welcome home.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe... It's good to be back.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I should get going. We'll talk later.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... It seems she didn't take to being called research material.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I suppose what we call her doesn't matter, but if I had to say...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: She doesn't just carry the hopes and dreams of others... She is our hopes and dreams.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that sums it up perfectly.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that sums it up perfectly.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Suzukaaa! Thank you for that incredible race!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: You better keep running your heart out!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, everyone. Your cheers of encouragement were what
pushed me forward.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
And I plan to keep going, running towards that beautiful scenery time
and time again. So please...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I hope you'll enjoy the view of me from the stands just as much!
